title: Verified milestones and current phase status
summary: Verified: B9.5 identity cleanup and B9.7 Operator Mode confirmation layer. Active focus remains B9.8 local scan bridge hardening; runtime service, GitHub, model, and browser status require fresh proof by domain.
body: Verified status contains proven facts and current phase flags. Proven: B3.2 launch baseline checks pass; B9.5 personal-assistant identity repair passed; B9.5.1/B9.5.2 removed bad companion wording from normal identity/purpose answers; B9.7 Operator Mode slash confirmation layer passed (default OFF, mutation requires explicit operator command, stage first, confirm before execute, high-risk typed confirmation). Active focus remains B9.8 local scan routing/bridge hardening unless a newer active focus record supersedes it. Local scan behavior is wired for operator actions, but host bridge runtime availability remains environment-dependent and should be reported honestly as unavailable when not running. Historical readiness or model proofs must not be blended with current GitHub/repo, local Windows path, Docker/service, Ollama/model, browser smoke/test, or memory/focus status unless each part has fresh proof in the current session.

facts.statement: Branch is main and synced with origin/main.
A prior operator readiness proof showed Core API, frontend, Open WebUI, and Ollama reachable in that session.
A prior operator readiness proof showed auth enforcement and chat proof passing in that session.
A prior operator readiness proof showed metadata.model_use_receipt present and model_use_receipt.model_tag matching the effective chat model in that session.
The last verified operator readiness proof used qwen3:14b.
